title: Fruit Bat Origin
description: Datapack add-on for Origins mod. Become a fruit eating, disease spreading bat and live your best life while others try to find their way trough the dark.
body:
### If there is some sort of issue with the origin, you have additional questions or are interested in my other works, feel free to [Join my Discord](https://discord.gg/Tu8UvDzqQG)

## Requires Pehkui for size change.

## Do you ever wanted to become a small, fruit eating bat that spreads diseases? If so, that is a weird wish, but i got you covered! I present to you:
# Fruit Bat
Impact: 🔴🔴🔴

_One of the larger bat species, feeding on fruit and nectar._

🟡**Nectarivore** - Your diet consists primarily of nectar and fruits.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Every second while standing in block with a flower, you have a chance to feed yourself (70% for 1 food point, 30% for 1 food + 1 saturation point; rolled separately)
  - You can consume the nectar from the flower you are holding with a chance to not consume the flower (50%) (3 hunger points+ 1 saturation, 70% to get 1 additional hunger & saturation point) [4sec cd] [Ability won't work when you are full or when you were hit by a player in the last 8 seconds]
  - Fruits food and saturation values are doubled
  - You can only eat nectar and fruits

**Additional Info**: If you have additional mods that add more flowers and/or fruits, go to the bottom of the description
</details>

🟢**Sky Creature** - You were born with wings and know how to use them, although it is tiring.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You have wings
  - You can boost yourself while flying [4seconds cooldown]
  - Flying and boosting exhausts you
  - You can't use rockets or wear normal elytra (hidden)
</details>

🟢**Sharpened Senses** - Your senses of smell and sight allow you to detect the presence of nearby creatures.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Entities in 15 block radius from you will glow
</details>

🟡**Noctural** - Your sharpened vision is adapted to being in dark places, so you can see better in the dark; but if it's too bright, your vision will deteriorate, which you can counter.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You see better in the dark (Light 5 or less)
  - If it's too bright, your vision will worsen (Light 14 and more or exposed to sun)
  - You can get rid of the negative vision effect by wearing a leather helmet

**Additional Info**: Example of how the vision worsens due to light/ being exposed to sun
![Vision while in bright light/ exposed to sun, without leather hat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e37c9d7aa9ee25e1db47c0a1673752c3383c8a9d.png)
</details>

🟢**Child of the Night** - Night is the time when your species are the most active, which makes you feel safer.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Resistance Effect after sunset and trough the night
</details>

🟢**Disease Spreader** - Bats are recognized as some of the biggest spreaders of diseases, and you are no exception.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - When attacked, attacker has a chance to become infected with Poison (10%), Wither (5%) or Hunger (15%) for 5 seconds
  - Each effect chance is rolled separately
</details>

🟡**Warmth Lover** - You are accustomed to living in warm places, so you feel refreshed when you are in one. But you also feel weakened when staying in a very low temperature biomes.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - Regeneration in warm biomes
  - Weakness in very cold biomes

**Additional info**: Very cold biomes include mostly snowy biomes; cold ocean biomes are not included
</details>

🔴**Megabat** - You are bigger than a standard bat, and you are healthier than them as well. However, compared to human, you are still small and weak. You also have a rapid digestive system, which means that you get hungry quickly.
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - You exhaust faster
  - You are smaller than a block and have 6 hearts

</details>

## Do you play with additional mods that add fruits or/and flowers?
If you want the origin to use them, here is how.
**Flowers**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - find "tags" folder in the datapack file
  - add ID's of the flowers you want to add to the "flowers" file ("items" section) and "b_flowers" file ("blocks" section)

**Make sure that you wrote the ID's correctly, otherwise the powers related to flowers won't work.**

**If you for some reason added items to the list, and later removed the mod they came from, remember to remove them from the list as well**

</details>

**Fruits**:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  - find "tags" folder in the datapack file
  - add ID's of the fruits you want to add to the "fruits" file ("items" section)

**Make sure that you wrote the ID's correctly, otherwise the powers related to fruits won't work.**

**If you for some reason added items to the list, and later removed the mod they came from, remember to remove them from the list as well**

</details>

### _Origins Datapacks just like this one work as add-ons for Origins Mod, supposed to expand the options provided by the mod._
